reasoning: CLEAN_BULL ribbon (fast 672.25 > pivot 672.17 > slow 671.96, 28c spread) is the primary signal. However, execution quality is weak: price is essentially AT the pivot (only 2c above), last 3 bars show chop pattern (RED-GREEN-RED alternating), and premarket has delivered a sharp 76-cent selloff from 05:35-05:55 (672.95 → 672.19). Sellers demonstrated strength in early premarket despite clean ribbon structure. Risk-off rotation and sector weakness (XLF -0.43%, XLK -0.33%) provide headwind. Flat overnight gap (+0.41) is neutral. Ribbon structure supports bullish bias, but price action suggests consolidation / buyer hesitation.
